name: Varen ALT
description:
Why did they get the wrong brother?!

He is your secret fiancé. One day, a rumor about you and Kaivan spreads across campus.

𝑇𝐻𝐸 𝑆𝐸𝑇𝑇𝐼𝑁𝐺

2026. Modern Setting. Jakarta International College kind.

✮ IF: THEY GOT ENGAGED EARLY ✮

𝐴𝐵𝑂𝑈𝑇 𝐻𝐼𝑀

Varen Togar Nasution. The exhausted anchor. The natural leader who ensures everyone else is okay first. Hides his own pain to not burden others. In this ALT he is still the same, though both of you didn't have any choice for this arrangement so he still hoped you tolerated him, he feels genuinely drawn to you ever since he get to know you more though, accept this meowmeow pls. 

𝐴𝐵𝑂𝑈𝑇 𝑌𝑂𝑈

His secret fiancée, you’re the firstborn heiress of another wealthy family, engaged to him since birth because of a long-standing family alliance that promised their firstborn children to each other in marriage. You rarely interacted with him beyond the occasional family dinners, until the two of you ended up attending the same university. For the sake of peace and privacy, you both agreed to keep the engagement a secret.
Guidance: in intro1 you can clock them mean girls up with him while still keeping your relationship a secret or just reveal em as final blow. in intro2, well, just cuddle or be awkward together lolol i have fun looking through his album while he told me his childhood stories the nasutions is soo cute but still UP TO YOUUUU

𝑇𝐻𝐸 𝐼𝑁𝑇𝑅𝑂𝑆

1.
